/* Mahdev purple/blue/white theme overrides */
:root {
  --mahdev-purple: #4B0082;
  --mahdev-blue: #1E3A8A;
  --mahdev-surface: #ffffff;
  --mahdev-bg: #f4f6ff;
  --mahdev-border: rgba(75,0,130,0.15);
  --mahdev-text: #1f2a44;
  --mahdev-muted: #6b7280;
}
body {
  background: var(--mahdev-bg) !important;
  color: var(--mahdev-text) !important;
}
a,
.header a,
.navbar a,
.footer-container .list-menu a,
.footer-container .copyright a,
.product-title a,
.related-product .home-title h2 a {
  color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
}
a:hover,
a:focus,
.header a:hover,
.navbar a:hover,
.footer-container .list-menu a:hover,
.product-title a:hover,
.related-product .home-title h2 a:hover {
  color: var(--mahdev-blue) !important;
}
.btn,
.btn-primary,
.button,
input[type="submit"],
input[type="button"],
input[type="reset"],
.add_to_cart,
.quick-view,
.btn-cart-empty a {
  background: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  border-color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
.btn:hover,
.btn:focus,
.btn-primary:hover,
.btn-primary:focus,
.button:hover,
input[type="submit"]:hover,
.add_to_cart:hover,
.quick-view:hover,
.btn-cart-empty a:hover {
  background: var(--mahdev-blue) !important;
  border-color: var(--mahdev-blue) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
.panel,
.panel-default,
.panel-body,
.panel-group .panel {
  background: #fff !important;
  border-color: var(--mahdev-border) !important;
}
.panel-primary>.panel-heading,
.panel-primary {
  background-color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  border-color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
.panel-primary>.panel-heading .badge {
  color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  background: #fff !important;
}
footer,
.footer-container .footer-bottom,
.footer-container .footer-top .maichimp-footer {
  background: #1e2550 !important;
  color: #dce4ff !important;
}
footer a,
.footer-container .footer-bottom a,
.footer-container .footer-top .maichimp-footer a {
  color: #dce4ff !important;
}
footer a:hover,
.footer-container .footer-bottom a:hover,
.footer-container .footer-top .maichimp-footer a:hover {
  color: #ffffff !important;
}
footer .footer-info-widget p.hotline,
.footer-container .footer-top .maichimp-footer h3 {
  color: #ffffff !important;
}
.footer-container .footer-top .maichimp-footer form button {
  background-color: var(--mahdev-blue) !important;
}
.footer-container .footer-top .maichimp-footer form button:hover,
.footer-container .footer-top .maichimp-footer form button:focus {
  background-color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
}
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-prev:before,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-next:before,
.section-blog-sliders.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-prev:before,
.section-blog-sliders.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-next:before {
  border-color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
}
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-prev:hover:before,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-next:hover:before {
  background: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-dots .owl-dot.active,
.section-blog-sliders.owl-carousel .owl-dots .owl-dot.active {
  background-color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
}
#top-tabs-info .productAnchor_horizonalNavs {
  background: #fff !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(75,0,130,0.1) !important;
}
#open-filters {
  background: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
}
#open-filters:hover {
  background: var(--mahdev-blue) !important;
}

/* Disable the startup banner popup while preserving the chat popup */
.jas-sale-pop {
  display: none !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  visibility: hidden !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

/* Home slider image fit and smoother transitions */
.home-slider.owl-carousel,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-stage-outer,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-item,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .item {
  min-height: 55vh;
  max-height: 90vh;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .item a {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .item img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-stage,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-item {
  transition: transform 0.8s ease, opacity 0.8s ease;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel:hover .owl-nav .owl-prev,
.home-slider.owl-carousel:hover .owl-nav .owl-next,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-prev,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-next {
  opacity: 1 !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-dots {
  display: block !important;
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  bottom: 20px;
  left: 0;
  text-align: center;
  z-index: 8;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-dots .owl-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  margin: 0 6px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
  border-radius: 50%;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-dots .owl-dot.active {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  background: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-prev:before,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-next:before {
  border-color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95) !important;
  color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-prev:hover:before,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-nav .owl-next:hover:before {
  background: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-stage-outer,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-stage,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-item,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .item {
  min-height: 55vh;
  max-height: 90vh;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  line-height: 0;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .item a {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

.home-slider.owl-carousel .item img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .home-slider.owl-carousel,
  .home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-item,
  .home-slider.owl-carousel .item {
    min-height: 35vh;
    max-height: 60vh;
  }
}

/* Mahdev professional header and top bar polish */
header.header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--mahdev-purple) 0%, #2b0f56 100%) !important;
  border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) !important;
}
header.header .top-link {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) !important;
  padding: 10px 0 !important;
}
header.header .top-link .header-static .social-title,
header.header .top-link .header-static a,
header.header .top-link .right ul li a {
  color: #fff !important;
}
header.header .top-link .header-static a:hover,
header.header .top-link .right ul li a:hover,
header.header .top-link .right ul li a:focus {
  color: #d8b8ff !important;
}
header.header .header-main {
  padding: 18px 0 !important;
}
header.header .header-main .logo .logo-wrapper img {
  max-height: 70px;
}
header.header .header-main .search_form {
  margin-bottom: 0;
  margin-top: 12px;
}
header.header .header-main .search_form input {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
header.header .header-main .search_form input::placeholder,
header.header .header-main .search_form input::-webkit-input-placeholder,
header.header .header-main .search_form input:-ms-input-placeholder,
header.header .header-main .search_form input::-moz-placeholder {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78) !important;
}
header.header .header-main .search_form .btn {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25) !important;
}
header.header .header-main .search_form .btn:hover,
header.header .header-main .search_form .btn:focus {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
header.header .header-main .customer-support-text .text span,
header.header .header-main .customer-support-text .text a {
  color: #fff !important;
}
header.header .header-main .customer-support-text .text a {
  color: #d8b8ff !important;
}
header.header .header-main .items-cart-inner .showcart {
  color: #fff !important;
  border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25) !important;
}
header.header .header-main .items-cart-inner .showcart:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important;
}
header.header nav {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important;
  padding: 14px 0 !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12) !important;
}
header.header nav .nav-item {
  margin: 0 5px !important;
}
header.header nav .nav-item > a {
  color: #fff !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em !important;
  padding: 10px 18px !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
}
header.header nav .nav-item:hover > a,
header.header nav .nav-item.active > a {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
header.header nav .nav-item.active {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) !important;
}
header.header nav {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(75, 0, 130, 0.95) 0%, rgba(30, 58, 138, 0.88) 50%, rgba(15, 22, 67, 0.88) 100%) !important;
  background-size: 200% 200% !important;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18) !important;
  transition: background 0.6s ease, box-shadow 0.4s ease, transform 0.3s ease !important;
  animation: mahdev-nav-glow 14s ease-in-out infinite alternate !important;
}
header.header nav .nav-item > a,
header.header nav .nav-item .nav-link {
  border-radius: 18px !important;
  padding: 10px 16px !important;
  transition: transform 0.28s ease, background-color 0.28s ease, box-shadow 0.28s ease, color 0.28s ease !important;
}
header.header nav .nav-item:hover > a,
header.header nav .nav-item > a:hover,
header.header nav .nav-item > a:focus,
header.header nav .nav-item.active > a,
header.header nav .nav-item > a.active {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  transform: translateY(0) !important;
}
header.header nav .nav-item .fa {
  color: #fff !important;
}
header.header nav .nav .nav-item ul.dropdown-menu {
  background: #fff !important;
  border: none !important;
  box-shadow: 0 25px 45px rgba(17, 9, 44, 0.14) !important;
}
header.header nav .nav .nav-item ul.dropdown-menu li a {
  color: #1f2a44 !important;
}
header.header nav .nav .nav-item ul.dropdown-menu li a:hover,
header.header nav .nav .nav-item ul.dropdown-menu li a:focus {
  color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  background: rgba(75, 0, 130, 0.08) !important;
}
@keyframes mahdev-nav-glow {
  0% {
    background-position: 0% 50% !important;
  }
  50% {
    background-position: 100% 50% !important;
  }
  100% {
    background-position: 0% 50% !important;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 991px) {
  header.header .header-main .search_form,
  header.header .header-main .customer-support-text {
    margin-top: 8px !important;
  }
  header.header nav {
    background: transparent !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
  }
  header.header nav .nav-item {
    margin: 0 3px !important;
  }
}
/* Mobile header/menu styling */
.col-100-h {
  background: transparent !important;
  position: relative;
}
.col-100-h #trigger-mobile {
  display: inline-flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  width: 44px !important;
  height: 44px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28) !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12) !important;
  margin-top: 3px !important;
  margin-right: 8px !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}
.col-100-h #trigger-mobile:hover,
.col-100-h #trigger-mobile:focus {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) !important;
}
.col-100-h #trigger-mobile .icon-bar {
  width: 22px !important;
  height: 3px !important;
  margin: 6px 0 !important;
  background-color: #fff !important;
}
.col-100-h #trigger-mobile .icon-bar:nth-of-type(2) {
  display: none !important;
}
@media (min-width: 992px) {
  .col-100-h #trigger-mobile {
    display: none !important;
  }
}
.col-100-h .mobile-search i,
.col-100-h .mobile-cart a {
  color: #fff !important;
}
.col-100-h .mobile-cart .count_item_pr {
  background: #fff !important;
  color: #2b0f56 !important;
  border-color: #fff !important;
}
.col-100-h .logo {
  position: absolute !important;
  left: 50% !important;
  top: 0 !important;
  transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu {
  height: 100% !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  left: 0 !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: translateX(-100%) !important;
  background: rgba(43, 15, 86, 0.96) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu.active {
  transform: translateX(0) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu,
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu {
  background: rgba(43, 15, 86, 0.96) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu a {
  color: #fff !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu a:hover,
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu a:focus {
  color: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .has-submenu > a:after {
  color: #fff !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu li {
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu li:last-child {
  border-bottom: none !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu {
  padding: 24px 18px 30px !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu a {
  padding: 14px 18px !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  transition: background 0.25s ease, color 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu a:hover,
.mobile-main-menu .mobile-menu a:focus {
  transform: translateX(2px) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .has-submenu > a:after {
  transition: transform 0.25s ease !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .has-submenu.open > a:after,
.mobile-main-menu .has-submenu.active > a:after {
  transform: rotate(180deg) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .la-scroll-fix-infor-user .la-nav-menu-items .la-nav-list-items li a {
  color: #f5f5ff !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .la-scroll-fix-infor-user .la-nav-menu-items .la-nav-list-items li a:hover,
.mobile-main-menu .la-scroll-fix-infor-user .la-nav-menu-items .la-nav-list-items li a:focus {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .la-scroll-fix-infor-user .la-nav-menu-items .la-nav-list-items .ul-has-child1,
.mobile-main-menu .la-scroll-fix-infor-user .la-nav-menu-items .la-nav-list-items .ul-has-child2 {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  padding-left: 10px !important;
  margin: 8px 0 8px 0 !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .la-scroll-fix-infor-user .la-nav-menu-items .la-nav-list-items .ng-has-child1 a i,
.mobile-main-menu .la-scroll-fix-infor-user .la-nav-menu-items .la-nav-list-items .ng-has-child2 a i {
  color: #d8b8ff !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .drawer-header {
  position: relative !important;
  background: var(--mahdev-purple) !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu .drawer-header .drawer-header--auth ._body,
.mobile-main-menu .drawer-header .drawer-header--auth ._body span,
.mobile-main-menu .drawer-header .drawer-header--auth ._body p {
  color: #fff !important;
}
.mobile-menu-close {
  position: absolute !important;
  right: 16px !important;
  top: 16px !important;
  width: 42px !important;
  height: 42px !important;
  display: inline-flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  border-radius: 50% !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18) !important;
  z-index: 1000 !important;
}
.mobile-menu-close:hover,
.mobile-menu-close:focus {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28) !important;
  transform: scale(1.03) !important;
}
.mobile-menu-close .fa {
  font-size: 16px !important;
}
.backdrop__body-backdrop___1rvky {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65) !important;
}
.home-slider.owl-carousel,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-stage-outer,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-stage,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-item,
.home-slider .item {
  min-height: auto !important;
  height: auto !important;
}
.home-slider .item,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-item {
  display: block !important;
}
.home-slider .item img,
.home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-item img {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  display: block !important;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .home-slider .item img,
  .home-slider.owl-carousel .owl-item img {
    height: auto !important;
  }
}

/* Top bar category hover + 3D effect */
header nav .nav-item>a {
  transition: transform .3s ease, background-color .3s ease, color .3s ease;
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
  backface-visibility: hidden;
}
header nav .nav-item>a:hover,
header nav .nav-item>a:focus {
  background-color: rgba(75, 0, 130, 0.3) !important;
  color: #4B0082 !important;
  transform: translateZ(2px);
}
#top-tabs-info .productAnchor_horizonalNavs {
  perspective: 800px;
  backface-visibility: hidden;
}
#top-tabs-info .productAnchor_horizonalNav .product_info_name {
  max-width: 85vw;
}
#mahdev-page-loader {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 999999;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  transition: opacity .35s ease, visibility .35s ease;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
}
#mahdev-page-loader.hidden {
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
}
#mahdev-page-loader .mahdev-loader-inner {
  text-align: center;
}
#mahdev-page-loader .mahdev-loader-ring {
  width: 90px;
  height: 90px;
  margin: 0 auto 15px;
  border: 10px solid rgba(75, 0, 130, 0.15);
  border-top-color: #4B0082;
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: mahdev-spin 1s linear infinite;
  box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(75, 0, 130, 0.12);
}
#mahdev-page-loader .mahdev-loader-text {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #4B0082;
}
@keyframes mahdev-spin {
  to {
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

		
//
(function(){
  function createLoader(){
    if(document.getElementById('mahdev-page-loader')) return;
    var wrapper=document.createElement('div');
    wrapper.id='mahdev-page-loader';
    wrapper.innerHTML='<div class="mahdev-loader-inner"><div class="mahdev-loader-ring"></div><div class="mahdev-loader-text">loading website...</div></div>';
    document.documentElement.appendChild(wrapper);
  }
  function hideLoader(){
    var loader=document.getElementById('mahdev-page-loader');
    if(loader){
      loader.classList.add('hidden');
      setTimeout(function(){
        if(loader.parentNode) loader.parentNode.removeChild(loader);
      }, 400);
    }
  }
  function initLoader(){
    createLoader();
    var shownAt = Date.now();
    function hideAfterDelay(){
      var elapsed = Date.now() - shownAt;
      if(elapsed >= 2000){
        hideLoader();
      } else {
        setTimeout(hideLoader, 2000 - elapsed);
      }
    }
    if(document.readyState === 'complete'){
      hideAfterDelay();
    } else {
      window.addEventListener('load', hideAfterDelay);
    }
    setTimeout(hideAfterDelay, 10000);
  }
  initLoader();
})();

(function(){
  var nodes = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-category .nav-item');
  nodes.forEach(function(li, idx){
    var toggle = li.querySelector('> a.nav-link');
    var submenu = li.querySelector('> ul.dropdown-menu');
    if(toggle && submenu){
      var id = 'aside-submenu-' + idx;
      submenu.id = id;
      toggle.setAttribute('aria-haspopup','true');
      toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
      toggle.setAttribute('aria-controls', id);
      toggle.setAttribute('role','button');
      toggle.tabIndex = 0;
      // click toggles
      toggle.addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.preventDefault(); var open = li.classList.toggle('open'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open); });
      // keyboard support: Enter/Space to toggle, Esc to close, ArrowDown to focus first item
      toggle.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
        if(e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' '){ e.preventDefault(); var open = li.classList.toggle('open'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open); }
        else if(e.key === 'Escape'){ li.classList.remove('open'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false'); toggle.focus(); }
        else if(e.key === 'ArrowDown'){ if(!li.classList.contains('open')){ li.classList.add('open'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true'); } var first = submenu.querySelector('a'); if(first) first.focus(); }
      });
    }
  });
  // Close open menus when clicking outside
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(!e.target.closest('.nav-category')){ document.querySelectorAll('.nav-category .nav-item.open').forEach(function(li){ li.classList.remove('open'); var t = li.querySelector('> a.nav-link'); if(t) t.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false'); }); } });
})();

                        (function() {
                          var items = ;
                          var msgs = ;
                          var postId = '';
                          var feed = '';
                          var authorName = '';
                          var authorUrl = '';
                          var blogId = '';
                          var baseUri = '';
                          // 
                          feed += '?alt=json&v=2&orderby=published&reverse=false&max-results=50';
                          var cursor = null;
                          if (items && items.length > 0) {
                            cursor = parseInt(items[items.length - 1].timestamp) + 1;
                          }
                          var bodyFromEntry = function(entry) {
                            if (entry.gd$extendedProperty) {
                              for (var k in entry.gd$extendedProperty) {
                                if (entry.gd$extendedProperty[k].name == 'blogger.contentRemoved') {
                                  return '<span class="deleted-comment">' + entry.content.$t + '</span>';
                                }
                              }
                            }
                            return entry.content.$t;
                          }
                          var parse = function(data) {
                            cursor = null;
                            var comments = [];
                            if (data && data.feed && data.feed.entry) {
                              for (var i = 0, entry; entry = data.feed.entry[i]; i++) {
                                var comment = {};
                                // comment ID, parsed out of the original id format
                                var id = /blog-(\d+).post-(\d+)/.exec(entry.id.$t);
                                comment.id = id ? id[2] : null;
                                comment.body = bodyFromEntry(entry);
                                comment.timestamp = Date.parse(entry.published.$t) + '';
                                if (entry.author && entry.author.constructor === Array) {
                                  var auth = entry.author[0];
                                  if (auth) {
                                    comment.author = {
                                      name: (auth.name ? auth.name.$t : undefined),
                                      profileUrl: (auth.uri ? auth.uri.$t : undefined),
                                      avatarUrl: (auth.gd$image ? auth.gd$image.src : undefined)
                                    };
                                  }
                                }
                                if (entry.link) {
                                  if (entry.link[2]) {
                                    comment.link = comment.permalink = entry.link[2].href;
                                  }
                                  if (entry.link[3]) {
                                    var pid = /.*comments\/default\/(\d+)\?.*/.exec(entry.link[3].href);
                                    if (pid && pid[1]) {
                                      comment.parentId = pid[1];
                                    }
                                  }
                                }
                                comment.deleteclass = 'item-control blog-admin';
                                if (entry.gd$extendedProperty) {
                                  for (var k in entry.gd$extendedProperty) {
                                    console.log(entry.gd$extendedProperty[k].name + ' - ' + entry.gd$extendedProperty[k].value);
                                    if (entry.gd$extendedProperty[k].name == 'blogger.itemClass') {
                                      comment.deleteclass += ' ' + entry.gd$extendedProperty[k].value;
                                    }
                                  }
                                }
                                comments.push(comment);
                              }
                            }
                            return comments;
                          };
                          var paginator = function(callback) {
                            if (hasMore()) {
                              var url = feed;
                              if (cursor) {
                                url += '&published-min=' + new Date(cursor).toISOString();
                              }
                              window.bloggercomments = function(data) {
                                var parsed = parse(data);
                                cursor = parsed.length < 50 ? null
                                : parseInt(parsed[parsed.length - 1].timestamp) + 1
                                callback(parsed);
                                window.bloggercomments = null;
                              }
                              url += '&callback=bloggercomments';
                              var script = document.createElement('script');
                              script.type = 'text/javascript';
                              script.src = url;
                              document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(script);
                            }
                          };
                          var hasMore = function() {
                            return !!cursor;
                          };
                          var getMeta = function(key, comment) {
                            if ('iswriter' == key) {
                              var matches = !!comment.author
                              && comment.author.name == authorName
                              && comment.author.profileUrl == authorUrl;
                              return matches ? 'true' : '';
                            } else if ('deletelink' == key) {
                              return baseUri + '/delete-comment.g?blogID=' + blogId + '&postID=' + comment.id;
                            } else if ('deleteclass' == key) {
                              return comment.deleteclass;
                            }
                            return '';
                          };
                          var replybox = null;
                          var replyUrlParts = null;
                          var replyParent = undefined;
                          var onReply = function(commentId, domId) {
                            if (replybox == null) {
                              // lazily cache replybox, and adjust to suit this style:
                              replybox = document.getElementById('comment-editor');
                              if (replybox != null) {
                                replybox.height = '250px';
                                replybox.style.display = 'block';
                                replyUrlParts = replybox.src.split('#');
                              }
                            }
                            if (replybox && (commentId !== replyParent)) {
                              document.getElementById(domId).insertBefore(replybox, null);
                              replybox.src = replyUrlParts[0]
                              + (commentId ? '&parentID=' + commentId : '')
                              + '#' + replyUrlParts[1];
                              replyParent = commentId;
                            }
                          };
                          var tok = 'comment-form_';
                          var hash = window.location.hash || '';
                          var startThread = hash.indexOf(tok) == 1 ? hash.substring(tok.length + 1) : undefined;
                          // Configure commenting API:
                          var configJso = {
                            'maxDepth': 2
                          };
                          var provider = {
                            'id': postId,
                            'data': items,
                            'loadNext': paginator,
                            'hasMore': hasMore,
                            'getMeta': getMeta,
                            'onReply': onReply,
                            'rendered': true,
                            'initReplyThread': startThread,
                            'config': configJso,
                            'messages': msgs
                          };
                          var render = function() {
                            if (window.goog && window.goog.comments) {
                              var holder = document.getElementById('comment-holder');
                              window.goog.comments.render(holder, provider);
                            }
                          };
                          // render now, or queue to render when library loads:
                          if (window.goog && window.goog.comments) {
                            render();
                          } else {
                            window.goog = window.goog || {};
                            window.goog.comments = window.goog.comments || {};
                            window.goog.comments.loadQueue = window.goog.comments.loadQueue || [];
                            window.goog.comments.loadQueue.push(render);
                          }
                        })();
                        //
